name: Sun Qian
page_title: Sun Qian 孫謙 [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Saved Sima Yi’s life from a trigger-happy commander.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	孫謙


	 Pronunciation 
	Sun1 Qian1


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Sūn Qiān


	 Wade-Giles 
	Sun Ch‘ien

	 Other Names 
	Suen Qian, Sun Qiao

	 Name Notes 
	Called Suen Qian in the Moss Roberts version of the novel to distinguish him from Sun Qian (Gongyou). Called Sun Qiao in the Brewitt-Taylor translation.

full_text:
Sun Qian 孫謙
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Qian (孫謙). Saved Sima Yi’s life from a trigger-happy commander. Sun Qian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
